info.title: AI Business Platform API
info.description: Authentication & RBAC endpoints for the AI Business Platform. See ARCHITECTURE.md, API.md, and BACKEND.md in the repository root for the full system design.

get.summary: List message history for a conversation (conversation history)

post.summary: Send a message and stream the assistant's reply (text/event-stream)
post.description: SSE frames: `user_message`, `delta` (incremental content), `tool_call`, `tool_result`, `message` (final content + token usage), `error`.

403.description: Not the owner of this conversation

get.summary: List the caller's own AI conversations

post.summary: Start a new AI conversation

system_prompt.description: Falls back to the configured default when omitted

model.description: Falls back to the configured default model when omitted

delete.summary: Delete a conversation and its message history

get.summary: List audit log entries. Requires the owner or admin role.

403.description: Caller does not hold the owner or admin role

get.summary: Per-step audit trail for one job run

post.summary: Retry a failed job (resets attempts and re-dispatches)

400.description: Job is not in a retryable (failed) state

post.summary: Create a workflow (starts as draft — activate separately)

steps.description: Ordered: exactly one trigger step first, then any condition steps, then one or more action steps

delete.summary: Delete a workflow and its run history

post.summary: Activate a workflow so it starts matching its trigger
Pause a workflow so it stops matching its trigger
Create a department

get.summary: List employees — full directory for Owner/Admin/HR, department-scoped for managers

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Matches name, email, or employee number

post.summary: Create an employee (system-generates the employee number). Requires Admin, HR, or Owner.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's own employee profile

404.description: No employee record is linked to this account

patch.summary: Update an employee. Employees may update their own contact/profile fields; only Admin/HR/Owner may change department, position, manager, status, or dates.

403.description: Not authorized to change one or more of the submitted fields

post.summary: Upload a profile picture

422.description: Validation failed (not an image, or too large)

post.summary: Add a note to an employee

403.description: Not authorized to add notes for this employee

post.summary: Create a position
Create a product category
Create a product (also provisions its stock record)

parameters.name: low_stock
parameters.description: Only items at or below their reorder point

post.summary: Adjust stock quantity, recording a movement in the ledger

quantity.description: Signed delta: positive for inbound, negative for outbound

get.summary: List a product's stock movement ledger

post.summary: Create a supplier
Ask a question answered from the knowledge base, with citations
Upload a PDF document (multipart/form-data). Processing (extraction, chunking, embedding) runs asynchronously.

title.description: Defaults to the original filename when omitted

422.description: Validation failed (e.g. not a PDF, too large)

get.summary: Get a single document, including its processing status

delete.summary: Delete a document and its chunks

post.summary: Register a new user and their tenant

201.description: Account and tenant created, token issued

post.summary: Authenticate and receive a Sanctum token

tenant_slug.description: Required only when the account belongs to multiple tenants

409.description: Account belongs to multiple tenants, tenant_slug required

post.summary: Revoke the current access token
Request a password reset link

200.description: Generic confirmation, regardless of whether the email exists

post.summary: Reset a password using a reset token

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's profile and tenant memberships

patch.summary: Update the authenticated user's name and email

get.summary: List assignable system roles. Requires the owner or admin role.

403.description: Caller does not hold the owner or admin role

post.summary: Upload an attachment (multipart/form-data, field name "file", max 10MB)

get.summary: List comments for a ticket. Internal notes are only included for staff with addInternalNote rights.

post.summary: Add a comment. Set is_internal=true for a technician/admin-only note (requester cannot).

get.summary: List tickets — full directory for Owner/Admin, department-scoped for managers, self-scoped otherwise

post.summary: Create a ticket (system-generates the ticket number). Any employee may create one for themselves.

employee_id.description: Owner/Admin only — defaults to the caller

get.summary: Dashboard statistics: open/closed counts, average resolution time, breakdowns by department/priority/technician

patch.summary: Update ticket content (type, priority, subject, description, resolution notes)

post.summary: Assign or reassign a technician. Admin only.

patch.summary: Change ticket status (not to/from closed — use /close and /reopen for those)

post.summary: Close a ticket with resolution notes
Reopen a resolved or closed ticket

400.description: Ticket is not in a reopenable state

sanctum.description: Send the token returned by /api/v1/auth/register or /api/v1/auth/login as 'Authorization: Bearer {token}'.

tags.name: AI Assistant
tags.description: AI conversations, message history, and chat

tags.name: Inventory / Stock
tags.description: Stock levels and movement ledger, one record per product

tags.name: Knowledge Base
tags.description: PDF document upload, processing, and management

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, logout, and password reset

tags.name: Ticket Comments
tags.description: Comments and internal notes on a ticket
